fault_hypothesis: The de-duplication logic starting on line 70 is incorrect. It causes a valid element to be removed on line 71 when both input lists share the same final value, violating the expectation that all elements are preserved.

constraints.intent: After the merge logic completes, the total number of elements must equal the sum of elements from both inputs.
The special de-duplication branch for shared tail elements should never be executed.
If the de-duplication logic is not triggered, the merged list's length must be correct.
The final returned list must contain all elements from both input lists.
